reason: This is a general motivational quote in Arabic about overcoming difficulties. It translates to 'Calm waves don't make good sailors, clear skies don't make skilled pilots, and life without difficulties doesn't make strong people.' Contains no ISIS-specific content or extremist ideology.
original_post: الأمواج الهادئة لاتصنع بحارة جيدين والسماء الصافية لاتصنع طيارين ماهرين والحياة بدون صعوبات لاتصنع أشخاصًا أقوياء ..
